summary: Frontend testing complete for 3 new features: Status filter chips on Films page, merged Work With Us + Contact page, and Contact link removal/redirect. All 12 test cases passed successfully.

tests_passed: Films page - Genre filter works correctly - PASS
Films page - Status filter chips appear and work (All, Development, Packaging, Pre-Production, Filming, Post-Production, Marketing, Released) - PASS
Films page - Both filters can be used simultaneously - PASS
Films page - Clear filters button works - PASS
Work With Us page - Two toggle buttons appear (Submit a Project, General Enquiry) - PASS
Work With Us page - Default state shows 'Select an option above to get started' - PASS
Work With Us page - Submit Project form expands with all fields (Name, Email, Role, Submission Type, Format, Genres, Project Stage, Logline, Link, Message, checkboxes, Submit button) - PASS
Work With Us page - General Enquiry form expands with all fields (Name, Email, Phone, Topic, Message, Submit button) - PASS
Work With Us page - CineConnect card visible in right column with Register Interest button - PASS
Work With Us page - Newsletter section at bottom with Join the Pack heading - PASS
Navigation - Contact link removed from header - PASS

films_page_status_filter.description: Status filter chips appear in 'Browse by Stage' dropdown with all 8 options
films_page_status_filter.combined_filtering: Genre + Status filters work together correctly
films_page_status_filter.clear_filters: Button appears when filters active, clears both filters

work_with_us_page.description: Merged Work With Us + Contact page with two-lane design
features: Two toggle buttons: Submit a Project, General Enquiry
Default state shows 'Select an option above to get started'
Submit Project form: Name, Email, Role, Submission Type, Format, Genres (chips), Project Stage, Logline (300 char), External Link, Message, 2 checkboxes, Submit button
General Enquiry form: Name, Email, Phone (optional), Topic dropdown, Message, Submit button
CineConnect card in right column with Register Interest button
Newsletter section at bottom with email input and Subscribe button

navigation_changes.description: Contact link removed, redirect in place

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features tested and working: 1) Status filter chips on /films page with all 8 status options, 2) Work With Us page has two-lane design with Submit Project and General Enquiry forms plus CineConnect card, 3) Contact link removed from navigation and /contact redirects to /work-with-us. PDF watermarking improvements (backend) were not visually testable.
notes: PDF watermarking feature (single diagonal watermark per page instead of dense tiled text) is a backend-only change and cannot be visually verified through UI testing.
